# zenzop public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).

# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: zenzop.txt 88 lines (supported surface) | zenzop.features.txt 0 added (features: gzip,parallel,std,zlib) | zenzop.internal.txt 8 lines (8 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## items (71 lines)

pub mod zenzop
pub use Stop
pub use StopReason
pub use Unstoppable
pub enum BlockType
pub BlockType::Dynamic
pub BlockType::Fixed
pub BlockType::Uncompressed
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum ErrorKind
pub ErrorKind::Cancelled
pub ErrorKind::Interrupted
pub ErrorKind::Other
pub ErrorKind::WriteZero
pub enum Format
pub Format::Deflate
pub Format::Gzip
pub Format::Zlib
pub struct CompressResult<W>
pub fn CompressResult<W>::fully_optimized(&self) -> bool
pub fn CompressResult<W>::into_inner(self) -> W
pub struct DeflateEncoder<W: Write, S: enough::Stop>
pub fn DeflateEncoder<W, S>::finish(self) -> core::result::Result<CompressResult<W>, Error>
pub fn DeflateEncoder<W, S>::get_mut(&mut self) -> &mut W
pub fn DeflateEncoder<W, S>::get_ref(&self) -> &W
pub fn DeflateEncoder<W, S>::with_stop(Options, W, S) -> Self
pub fn DeflateEncoder<W, S>::with_stop_buffered(Options, W, S) -> std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>
pub fn DeflateEncoder<W>::new(Options, W) -> Self
pub fn DeflateEncoder<W>::new_buffered(Options, W) -> std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>
pub struct Error
pub fn Error::kind(&self) -> ErrorKind
pub struct GzipEncoder<W: Write, S: enough::Stop>
pub fn GzipEncoder<W, S>::finish(self) -> core::result::Result<CompressResult<W>, Error>
pub fn GzipEncoder<W, S>::get_mut(&mut self) -> &mut W
pub fn GzipEncoder<W, S>::get_ref(&self) -> &W
pub fn GzipEncoder<W, S>::with_stop(Options, W, S) -> core::result::Result<Self, Error>
pub fn GzipEncoder<W, S>::with_stop_buffered(Options, W, S) -> core::result::Result<std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>, Error>
pub fn GzipEncoder<W>::new(Options, W) -> core::result::Result<Self, Error>
pub fn GzipEncoder<W>::new_buffered(Options, W) -> core::result::Result<std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>, Error>
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct Options
pub Options::block_type: BlockType
pub Options::enhanced: bool
pub Options::iteration_cap: core::num::nonzero::NonZeroU64
pub Options::iteration_count: core::num::nonzero::NonZeroU64
pub Options::iterations_without_improvement: core::num::nonzero::NonZeroU64
pub Options::maximum_block_splits: u16
pub fn Options::effective_iteration_count(&self) -> u64
pub fn Options::effective_iterations_without_improvement(&self) -> u64
pub fn Options::with_iteration_cap(self, core::num::nonzero::NonZeroU64) -> Self
pub struct ZlibEncoder<W: Write, S: enough::Stop>
pub fn ZlibEncoder<W, S>::finish(self) -> core::result::Result<CompressResult<W>, Error>
pub fn ZlibEncoder<W, S>::get_mut(&mut self) -> &mut W
pub fn ZlibEncoder<W, S>::get_ref(&self) -> &W
pub fn ZlibEncoder<W, S>::with_stop(Options, W, S) -> core::result::Result<Self, Error>
pub fn ZlibEncoder<W, S>::with_stop_buffered(Options, W, S) -> core::result::Result<std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>, Error>
pub fn ZlibEncoder<W>::new(Options, W) -> core::result::Result<Self, Error>
pub fn ZlibEncoder<W>::new_buffered(Options, W) -> core::result::Result<std::io::buffered::bufwriter::BufWriter<Self>, Error>
pub const DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS: u64
pub trait Write
pub fn Write::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn Write::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), Error>
pub fn Write::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, Error>
pub fn Write::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), Error>
pub fn &mut [u8]::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn &mut [u8]::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), Error>
pub fn &mut [u8]::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, Error>
pub fn &mut [u8]::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), Error>
pub fn &mut W::by_ref(&mut self) -> &mut Self where Self: core::marker::Sized
pub fn &mut W::flush(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), Error>
pub fn &mut W::write(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<usize, Error>
pub fn &mut W::write_all(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), Error>
pub fn compress<R: std::io::Read, W: Write>(Options, Format, R, W) -> core::result::Result<(), Error>

## trait impls (12 types)

&mut [u8]: Write
BlockType: Clone, Copy, Debug, Default, Eq, Hash, Ord, PartialEq, PartialOrd

5 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
